name: L4 — Tempest Apex Tempo
flavor: Faster than you. Twice. Then a third time, just to be sure.
description: Mono-VOLT / mono-STORMCHAIN tempo shell centered on tempest_apex. The L4 mutation raises the per-round extra-action cap from 1 to 2 (charter §22.2 L4). Phase 4h wires the catalog to the mutation: boltrunner now grants SELF an extra action on every kill; shock_runner grants RANDOM_ALLY an extra action on every kill; arc_lancer fires a damage strike on ON_EXTRA_ACTION_GRANTED. With the mutation active, a single kill chain by boltrunner can fire two extra actions in one round (cap 2 instead of 1), each of which can land on arc_lancer to detonate another LOWEST_HP_ENEMY hit. Without the mutation the second extra-action grant logs 'cap 1 reached' and the chain stops one step short. plasma_hound (ON_OPENING_ATTACK burst) and arc_predator (ON_KILL self-SPD pump) round out the tempo identity.
